#if DECIM_FLT_LEN == 16 
// -0.030011, -0.034628, 0.040923, 0.050018, -0.064308, -0.090032, 0.150053, 0.450158, 0.450158, 0.150053, -0.090032, -0.064308, 0.050018, 0.040923, -0.034628, -0.030011

#endif

// 0.026480, -0.030011, -0.034628, 0.040923, 0.050018, -0.064308, -0.090032, 0.150053, 0.450158, 0.450158, 0.150053, -0.090032, -0.064308, 0.050018, 0.040923, -0.034628, -0.030011, 0.026480

#endif 

#if DECIM_FLT_LEN == 20 
// 0.023693, 0.026480, -0.030011, -0.034628, 0.040923, 0.050018, -0.064308, -0.090032, 0.150053, 0.450158, 0.450158, 0.150053, -0.090032, -0.064308, 0.050018, 0.040923, -0.034628, -0.030011, 0.026480, 0.023693

// -0.021436, 0.023693, 0.026480, -0.030011, -0.034628, 0.040923, 0.050018, -0.064308, -0.090032, 0.150053, 0.450158, 0.450158, 0.150053, -0.090032, -0.064308, 0.050018, 0.040923, -0.034628, -0.030011, 0.026480, 0.023693, -0.021436

#if DECIM_FLT_LEN == 24 
// -0.019572, -0.021436, 0.023693, 0.026480, -0.030011, -0.034628, 0.040923, 0.050018, -0.064308, -0.090032, 0.150053, 0.450158, 0.450158, 0.150053, -0.090032, -0.064308, 0.050018, 0.040923, -0.034628, -0.030011, 0.026480, 0.023693, -0.021436, -0.019572

#if DECIM_FLT_LEN == 26 
// 0.018006, -0.019572, -0.021436, 0.023693, 0.026480, -0.030011, -0.034628, 0.040923, 0.050018, -0.064308, -0.090032, 0.150053, 0.450158, 0.450158, 0.150053, -0.090032, -0.064308, 0.050018, 0.040923, -0.034628, -0.030011, 0.026480, 0.023693, -0.021436, -0.019572, 0.018006

#if DECIM_FLT_LEN == 28 
// 0.016673, 0.018006, -0.019572, -0.021436, 0.023693, 0.026480, -0.030011, -0.034628, 0.040923, 0.050018, -0.064308, -0.090032, 0.150053, 0.450158, 0.450158, 0.150053, -0.090032, -0.064308, 0.050018, 0.040923, -0.034628, -0.030011, 0.026480, 0.023693, -0.021436, -0.019572, 0.018006, 0.016673

#endif 

#if DECIM_FLT_LEN == 30 
// -0.015523, 0.016673, 0.018006, -0.019572, -0.021436, 0.023693, 0.026480, -0.030011, -0.034628, 0.040923, 0.050018, -0.064308, -0.090032, 0.150053, 0.450158, 0.450158, 0.150053, -0.090032, -0.064308, 0.050018, 0.040923, -0.034628, -0.030011, 0.026480, 0.023693, -0.021436, -0.019572, 0.018006, 0.016673, -0.015523

#endif 

#if DECIM_FLT_LEN == 32 
// -0.014521, -0.015523, 0.016673, 0.018006, -0.019572, -0.021436, 0.023693, 0.026480, -0.030011, -0.034628, 0.040923, 0.050018, -0.064308, -0.090032, 0.150053, 0.450158, 0.450158, 0.150053, -0.090032, -0.064308, 0.050018, 0.040923, -0.034628, -0.030011, 0.026480, 0.023693, -0.021436, -0.019572, 0.018006, 0.016673, -0.015523, -0.014521

#endif 

#if !((16 <= DECIM_FLT_LEN) && (DECIM_FLT_LEN <= 32) && ((DECIM_FLT_LEN % 2) == 0)) 
#error "Decimator filter length is not supported!" 
#endif
